convergence.rule: A phase is converged at N^3 when |Erel(N^3)-Erel((N-1)^3)| <= 0.05 kJ mol^-1 per H2O.

dmc_reference.citation: Della Pia, Zen, Alfe, and Michaelides, J. Chem. Phys. 157, 134701 (2022)

fixed_k333_same_mesh_comparison.gxtb_warning: The g-xTB k333 value is numerically unconverged and must not be substituted for the phase-wise k-point-converged result.
fixed_k333_same_mesh_comparison.purpose: identical fixed-mesh comparator across GFN1-xTB, GFN2-xTB, and g-xTB
